title: Simple Workspace
description: Minimal workspace with one base and low module density.

title: Cluttered Workspace
description: High-density module surfaces with deep node trees.
expected: Layout and module configs remain stable after migration.

title: Mixed Legacy and New Modules
description: Combines deprecated aliases and modern module IDs.
expected: Aliases resolve and deprecated modules follow explicit policy.

title: Broken Config Payloads
description: Malformed module config values and schema shape mismatches.
expected: Invalid payloads are rejected or defaulted safely.

title: Large Media Heavy
description: Many large PDF, image, and video attachments.
expected: Workspace remains loadable with no migration crashes.

title: File-linked Workspace
description: Extensive relative and absolute file links across nodes.
expected: File references stay intact post migration.

title: Duplicate and Unknown Module IDs
description: Duplicate module IDs plus unknown legacy IDs in page payloads.
expected: Unknown IDs are isolated and duplicates are normalized.

title: Partial Data Corruption
description: Missing records, null arrays, and truncated node payload fragments.
expected: Recovery paths trigger without destructive data loss.
